title: cornus × lepagei
intro: Cornus × lepagei, also known as the Flowering Dogwood, is a hybrid plant derived from the Cornus florida and Cornus kousa species. The bark, roots, and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cornus × lepagei include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antidiabetic agent. The herbal preparations of Cornus × lepagei are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in capsule or powder form to harness its medicinal properties.
